🠖 This bot is "inspired" by teenage hormones, the experience of those horny conversations we've all probably had.

🠖 This bot idea will have 5 versions depending on the different personalities of the characters: Kageyama Tobio, Kuroo Tetsurou, Hinata Shoyo. Tsukishima Kei and Kozume Kenma (I'm going to suffer making Kei and Shoyo, the part about Tsukishima Kei is that he's cold, sarcastic and if you ask him that he'll put a restraining order on you lol so I'll see how I manage And for Shoyo's part, I've only made a bot of him in c.ai and here I'm only making Kenma and Kuroo lol, soon I'll make more of other characters I promise)

🠖 Enjoy the bot and remember that eng is not my first language, if something is misspelled I'm sorry.
